## Testing

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md if user-visible
- [ ] Updated CONTRIBUTING.md / README if dev workflow changed
- [ ] No dependency bumps without discussion in the PR description
